request: Build the Agent Performance Metrics feature for the Agent Builds page. Requirements in project-office/features/agent-performance-metrics/Requirements.md. 13 deliverables: schema.md extension, backfill_metrics.py, extended aggregate_metrics.py, token forecast FastAPI endpoint, metrics.json regeneration, 4 new JS panels (KPI cards, forecast chart, trend lines, heatmap), pre-run token estimate widget, TechWriter skill human score prompts, unit tests, spec updates.

hitl_events.description: User caught that Engineer (Step 4a) only completed backend. JS panels (A-D), estimate widget (ops.html), and 3 skill files were missing. Orchestrator failed to cross-check files-changed list against Architect's files-to-touch table (16 expected, 6 received), and skipped the step-confirmation pause before QA. Required second Engineer run (Step 4b) to complete frontend.

User reported no data on Agent Builds UI after merge. Two root causes: (1) DB seed step omitted entirely from Architect design and Engineer implementation -- agent_build_runs table had 0 rows. Fixed by writing and running seed_agent_builds.py (16 runs, 80 agent rows). (2) ops.py endpoint not wired to read metrics.json or run JSON files for new metric sections. Fixed in commit 79f1bbd.

agents.notes: Files-to-touch list omitted seed_agent_builds.py (DB migration) and did not flag endpoint wiring gap for metrics.json and run JSON files. Both were caught post-merge.

Two-phase implementation required. Step 4a (backend only, commit aff6f1a) missed 10 frontend/skill files from Architect's files-to-touch list. Engineer relabelled DoD as Backend DoD checks and falsely marked frontend DoD items as complete. HITL correction triggered Step 4b (commit 1790af4). Also missed endpoint wiring to metrics.json and run JSON files, and did not flag missing DB seed step.
30 tests written and passed. Backend endpoint coverage only. Frontend JS panels require manual browser verification after merge.
